synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20910 Oracle Linux 9 python-websockets bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20910
description:
[14.2-1]
- Update to 14.2 and add patch to remove shell=True
  Resolves: RHEL-113034
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20910

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20910.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
python3-websockets-14.2-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
python3-websockets-14.2-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/python-websockets-14.2-1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[14.2-1]
- Update to 14.2 and add patch to remove shell=True
  Resolves: RHEL-113034
